notableEvents.label: Javier Báez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Javier Báez grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Riley Greene scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Hao-Yu Lee out at 2nd. Javier Báez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Javier Báez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Javier Báez grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Riley Greene scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Hao-Yu Lee out at 2nd. Javier Báez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Gleyber Torres out at 2nd. Matt Vierling out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter pops out to third baseman David Hamilton.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton picked off and caught stealing 3rd base. David Hamilton to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Enmanuel De Jesus.

notableEvents.label: Blake Perkins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins hit by pitch. Joey Ortiz scores. Sal Frelick to 3rd. David Hamilton to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.

notableEvents.label: Luis Matos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Matos pops out to catcher Dillon Dingler.

notableEvents.label: Greg Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Greg Jones singles on a ground ball to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee, deflected by shortstop Kevin McGonigle. David Hamilton to 2nd.
